name: The Archon of the Void
description: A massive void entity emerges from the portal!

enemies.description_override: A writhing tendril of void energy
A writhing tendril of void energy

reinforcements.message: The Archon tears open reality, summoning more void spawn to its defense!

final_boss_defeated.display_message: The Archon of the Void lets out a reality-shaking scream as it dissolves into nothingness. The portal behind it collapses, the void energy dissipating. You've done it. You've saved Redstone - saved the entire world - from the Void Prince's invasion.

terror_in_redstone_complete.display_message: The Terror in Redstone is over.

special_rules.description: The Archon is a legendary-tier threat with multiple phases
All characters take 1d4 void damage at the start of each turn while in the Archon's presence
The battlefield itself is unstable - random effects may occur
If marcus_redeemed flag is set, the Archon has reduced max HP and damage (Marcus's sacrifice weakened the portal)
If marcus_fled_combat flag is set, the Archon is enraged and more dangerous (its intended vessel escaped)
The Archon can summon void spawn reinforcements during combat

ambient_description: The void portal tears fully open, and something MASSIVE begins to emerge. Reality itself screams in protest. What emerges is beyond mortal comprehension - a towering entity of living darkness, its form constantly shifting between nightmarish shapes. Hundreds of eyes open across its surface, all focused on you. This is the Archon of the Void - the herald and champion of the Void Prince. Its voice resonates directly in your mind: 'MORTALS. YOU DARE STAND AGAINST THE INFINITE? YOUR WORLD WILL BE CONSUMED. YOUR LIGHT WILL BE EXTINGUISHED. ONLY THE VOID IS ETERNAL.' The final battle begins.
victory_description: The Archon of the Void writhes and shrieks as your final blow strikes true. Its form begins to collapse, void energy spiraling back into the portal. 'IMPOSSIBLE...' its voice thunders in your mind, now tinged with something that might be fear. 'THE VOID PRINCE... WILL NOT FORGET... THIS WORLD... IS MARKED...' With a sound like reality tearing, the Archon is pulled back through the portal. The portal itself shudders, cracks spreading across its surface like breaking glass. Then, with a thunderous implosion, it collapses completely. Silence falls over the chamber. The oppressive void energy is gone. Sunlight - actual sunlight - begins to filter down from cracks in the ceiling above. You've done it. Against all odds, you've defeated the Archon and closed the portal. Redstone is safe. The world is safe. For now.
defeat_description: The Archon's power is too great. Its void magic tears through your defenses, and one by one, your party members fall. As darkness claims you, the last thing you hear is the Archon's triumphant voice: 'THE VOID PRINCE RISES. YOUR WORLD FALLS. THIS IS ONLY THE BEGINNING.' The portal expands, void energy pouring out like a flood. You have failed. Redstone - and perhaps the entire world - is doomed.
